Hi Everyone,

I am very excited to invite you to start a new **book club** with me and some other friends we've spoken with recently. We believe sharing stories and discussing themes together will deepen our appreciation for literature.

The first meeting would be scheduled for **[Date]** at **[Time]** at **[Location/Platform]**. We’ll discuss **[Book Title]** by **[Author Name]**, a fantastic novel I know many of you will enjoy. If you'd prefer, you can pick up the next recommendation from the list attached to this email, or bring your own suggestion for the next month’s selection.

Please let me know by **[Date]** if you can join us so we can finalize the headcount and order snacks! Looking forward to catching up with everyone and getting started.

Warmly,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
